name: snaptask
description: Composable Codex skills for reviewing AI-agent Goals and decomposing approved work into verifiable task cards.

interface.shortDescription: Review Goals and decompose approved AI-agent work
interface.longDescription: SnapTask reviews whether an AI-agent Goal is verifiable, bounded, safe, and complete before turning approved work into low-conflict task cards.
defaultPrompt: Review this Goal before I decompose it.
Turn this approved Goal into AI-ready task cards.
